case_title: BITTEL TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION VS TRUJILLO ENRIQUE DBA CARD SERVICE PACIFIC II

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $649.03 FILED BY BITTEL TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT TRUJILLO ENRIQUE DBA CARD SERVICE PACIFIC II ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
POS TO TRUJILLO ENRIQUE ONLY A COPY ON FILE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTEL TELECOMMUNICATIONS CORPORATION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRUJILLO ENRIQUE DBA CARD SERVICE PACIFIC II PLTF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN IN VIEW OF DEFT'S PAC BELL BILLS SHOWING PAYMENTS TO PLTF.AND PLTF'S STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
